description: GitLab MCP server for projects, merge requests, issues, pipelines, wiki, releases, and more.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.zereight/gitlab-mcp

environmentVariables.description: GitLab personal access token for local stdio use. Create a token with the GitLab scopes needed by the tools you plan to use, such as api or read_api.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitLab CI job token to use instead of a personal access token when running inside GitLab CI.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_JOB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a GitLab authentication cookie file for cookie-based authentication.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_AUTH_COOKIE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: GitLab API base URL. Use https://gitlab.com/api/v4 for GitLab.com or your self-managed GitLab API URL.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated list of GitLab project IDs that this server is allowed to access.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_ALLOWED_PROJECT_IDS

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose only read-only tools and block write operations.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_READ_ONLY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable GitLab wiki tools.
environmentVariables.name: USE_GITLAB_WIKI

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated list of toolsets to enable, such as projects, issues, merge_requests, pipelines, releases, users, groups, wiki, or search.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOOLSETS

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated list of individual tool names to add on top of enabled toolsets.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Optional regular expression used to hide matching tools from the server.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_DENIED_TOOLS_REGEX

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated list of tool names that require explicit approval before execution.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOOL_POLICY_APPROVE

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated list of tool names to hide from tools/list.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOOL_POLICY_HIDDEN

environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 only when you intentionally need to connect to a GitLab instance with invalid or self-signed TLS certificates.
environmentVariables.name: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a custom CA certificate file for self-managed GitLab instances.
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_CA_CERT_PATH
